bundle_title: AP English Essays Pack (Prompts + Scored Anchors)

prompts.prompt: Read the passage and write an essay analyzing how the author uses rhetorical choices to achieve a purpose.
Develop an argument using at least three of the provided sources and explain how the evidence supports your reasoning.
Develop an argument that takes a position on the issue and supports it with appropriate evidence.

anchors.student_response: Original short student-style response demonstrating the scoring level, with clear structure and limited length for app use.
rater_notes: Identifies thesis/claim quality
Notes evidence quality and commentary depth
Explains why sophistication point was/was not earned
revision_targets: Add one sentence of commentary explaining how evidence supports the claim.
Include a nuance/counterpoint for sophistication.

prompts.prompt: Read the poem and write an essay analyzing how the poet uses literary elements to develop a complex meaning.
Read the prose passage and write an essay analyzing how the author uses literary elements to develop a complex meaning.
Write an essay that develops a thesis about how a literary work conveys a thematic claim.
